news.title: On-Bright Releases New Generation of High-Efficiency AC-DC Controllers
news.summary: New QR flyback controllers deliver industry-leading efficiency for adapter and power supply applications
news.author: On-Bright Marketing Team
news.content:
On-Bright Electronics has announced a new generation of high-efficiency AC-DC controllers designed to meet the latest energy efficiency regulations while reducing system cost.

The new product family includes:
- Enhanced QR flyback controllers with improved valley detection
- New PFC controllers with integrated high-voltage drivers
- Advanced synchronous rectifier controllers for 5V-20V outputs
- USB-PD compatible controllers for modern adapter designs

Key improvements include:
- Standby power reduced to <30mW
- Active mode efficiency increased by 2-3%
- Enhanced protection features
- Reduced external component count

'These new products demonstrate our commitment to providing cost-effective, high-performance power management solutions,' said the On-Bright Product Marketing Director. 'Designers can now achieve the highest efficiency standards without increasing system cost.'

Samples and evaluation boards are available now through BeiLuo Electronics. Production quantities will be available in Q1 2026.

news.title: On-Bright and BeiLuo Electronics Expand Distribution Partnership
news.summary: Enhanced partnership provides improved inventory and technical support for On-Bright products in China
news.author: BeiLuo Electronics
news.content:
On-Bright Electronics and BeiLuo Electronics have announced an expansion of their distribution partnership to better serve the growing demand for power management ICs in China.

The enhanced partnership includes:
- Increased inventory levels for popular On-Bright products
- Dedicated FAE support for power supply design
- Joint technical training programs
- Faster sample and evaluation board delivery

'We are excited to strengthen our partnership with BeiLuo Electronics,' said On-Bright Sales Director. 'Their strong technical capabilities and broad customer base make them an ideal partner for expanding our market presence.'

BeiLuo Electronics customers now have access to enhanced technical support including schematic review, PCB layout guidance, and debugging assistance for On-Bright power management solutions.

news.title: On-Bright Releases Comprehensive LED Driver Reference Design
news.summary: Complete reference solution for 36W LED panel light drivers with high PF and low THD
news.author: On-Bright Applications Team
news.content:
On-Bright has released a comprehensive reference design for 36W LED panel light drivers, demonstrating best practices for commercial lighting applications.

The reference design features:
- Two-stage architecture with active PFC (OB3338)
- QR flyback LED driver (OB2263)
- Power factor >0.95, THD <15%
- Efficiency >88% at full load
- Flicker-free operation with <3% current ripple

Complete documentation includes:
- Schematic and PCB layout files
- Transformer design specifications
- BOM with multiple source options
- Test reports and EMI scan data

'This reference design provides a proven starting point for LED lighting manufacturers,' said the On-Bright FAE Manager. 'Customers can accelerate their development while ensuring compliance with commercial lighting standards.'

Evaluation boards are available through BeiLuo Electronics for immediate evaluation.

news.title: On-Bright Products Meet Latest Energy Efficiency Standards
news.summary: Power management ICs certified to meet DoE Level VI, CoC Tier 2, and EU efficiency requirements
news.author: On-Bright Quality Team
news.content:
On-Bright Electronics has completed certification testing for its AC-DC controller portfolio, confirming compliance with the latest international energy efficiency standards.

Certifications achieved:
- DoE Level VI (US Department of Energy)
- CoC Tier 2 (Code of Conduct)
- EU ErP Directive requirements
- California CEC Title 20

Key test results:
- Standby power <0.1W for all certified products
- Average efficiency >89% at 25%, 50%, 75%, 100% load points
- 10% load efficiency >85% for CoC Tier 2

'Energy efficiency is a core focus of our product development,' said the On-Bright Quality Director. 'These certifications demonstrate our commitment to helping customers meet global efficiency requirements.'

Test reports and compliance documentation are available upon request through BeiLuo Electronics.
